meaning: adj.可分配的,可归属的,可指定的
examples: This Agreement will be assignable in part or whole.
A generic type definition is not assignable from a closed constructed type.
The 2.5-acre property has a 51-panel solar system with a 20-year assignable contract with utility company Xcel Energy.
Among the custom-integration features included in all Denon "CI" models are a RS-232 for 3rd Party control and assignable high current DC trigger outputs.
